description_long: This is a well-dressed adult male figure with a modern, urban style, featuring a fitted vest over a collared shirt with rolled-up sleeves, a tie, and tailored pants. The figure wears gloves and has a belt with a visible buckle, adding to the professional yet stylish appearance. The shoes are formal and complement the overall business-casual attire. The individual has short, neatly styled hair and wears glasses, giving a sophisticated and intellectual look. The hands are detailed, with visible fingers and a natural pose, and the facial features are sharp and expressive. The figure's posture is upright and confident, suitable for a city street or business district environment.
description: A stylish adult male in business-casual attire with a vest, collared shirt, tie, gloves, and formal shoes, featuring short hair and glasses. The figure exudes a professional, urban vibe.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the figure, highlighting the rolled-up sleeves, gloves, and the fitted nature of the vest and pants.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full outfit, including the vest, tie, gloves, and facial features with glasses.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the figure's posture, glove details, and the sleek fit of the clothing.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the vest, pants, and hairstyle, as well as the back of the shoes and gloves.
attribute_clothing_type: business-casual vest over collared shirt with tie, tailored pants, and gloves
